SRE / DevOps Engineer — 5 years

Infrastructure & Automation:
• Terraform, Ansible — IaC provisioning across AWS and GCP multi-region
• Kubernetes, Helm — container orchestration, rolling deployments, HPA
• Docker — image build optimization, multi-stage builds, registry management

CI/CD & Automation:
• Jenkins, GitHub Actions — pipeline authoring, artifact caching, secret management
• Bash, Python — toil-elimination scripts, incident automation

Observability & Reliability:
• Prometheus, Grafana — metrics, dashboards, alerting with SLO/SLA error budget tracking
• On-call incident response — P1/P2 runbooks, post-mortems, root cause analysis
• Networking & security hardening — VPC design, IAM, Linux system hardening
